questions.question:
A workload placement diagnostics brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe remediation guidance.

A ConfigMap named `placement-diagnostics-brief` already exists in namespace `affinity-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetDeployment` is `api-fleet`
- `deploymentInventory` is `kubectl get deployment api-fleet -n affinity-lab -o wide`
- `replicaCheck` is `kubectl get deployment api-fleet -n affinity-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.replicas}'`
- `antiAffinityTopologyCheck` is `kubectl get deployment api-fleet -n affinity-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.affinity.podAntiAffinity.requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution[0].topologyKey}'`
- `antiAffinitySelectorCheck` is `kubectl get deployment api-fleet -n affinity-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.affinity.podAntiAffinity.requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution[0].labelSelector.matchLabels.app}'`
- `topologySpreadKeyCheck` is `kubectl get deployment api-fleet -n affinity-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.topologySpreadConstraints[0].topologyKey}'`
- `maxSkewCheck` is `kubectl get deployment api-fleet -n affinity-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.topologySpreadConstraints[0].maxSkew}'`
- `whenUnsatisfiableCheck` is `kubectl get deployment api-fleet -n affinity-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.topologySpreadConstraints[0].whenUnsatisfiable}'`
- `eventCheck` is `kubectl get events -n affinity-lab --sort-by=.lastTimestamp`
- `safeManifestNote` is `confirm pod anti-affinity selectors and topology spread constraints before changing the Deployment manifest`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q1/placement-diagnostics-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q1/placement-diagnostics-checklist.txt` with the sections `Deployment Inventory`, `Placement Checks`, and `Safe Manifest Review`

Do not restart the Deployment, do not delete pods, and do not patch the live placement rules during this drill.

verification.description: The placement diagnostics brief ConfigMap uses the intended workload target, anti-affinity inspection commands, topology spread checks, event check, and safe manifest guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact deployment inventory, placement checks, and safe manifest review commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe placement remediation guidance is removed
